history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person is seen indoors making hand gestures in front of their face while wearing a light-colored cap and a dark shirt.

Main Subject:
A young-looking person with short dark hair wears a white cap with a dark logo-like mark on the front and a black or dark shirt. Their face is partially covered by one hand while the other hand forms a small hand gesture near the mouth and nose area.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors with soft, warm lighting. The background includes a light-colored wall and a vertical, ribbed or corrugated surface on the right side of the image. A colorful item or surface is faintly visible near the lower left edge.

Visual Details:
The person’s cap is light-colored and wide with a curved brim, casting a shadow over the upper part of the face. Their hands are close to the face, with fingers positioned near the mouth and cheek. The hair is dark and slightly tousled around the sides of the cap. The person’s head is angled slightly toward the camera, and the shot is taken from a close, slightly off-center perspective, emphasizing the face and hands.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person wearing a white cap and dark clothing indoors. They hold their hands up near their face, partially covering their mouth area.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text present in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- None detected.

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo with no readable UI text, labels, captions, or documents.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian male with dark, styled hair and bangs is captured in a close-up, waist-up shot. He's wearing a plain black t-shirt and a light-colored baseball cap, tilted forward to partially obscure his forehead. His right hand is raised, with fingers gently touching his lips and nose, creating a shy or contemplative pose. His eyes are dark and expressive, with a hint of eyeliner enhancing them. The lighting is soft and warm, casting gentle shadows that highlight the contours of his face and hand. The background appears to be an indoor setting, with a textured wall that has horizontal wooden planks and a metal beam visible, suggesting a simple, perhaps slightly rustic or unfinished environment. The overall color palette is muted, with dominant tones of black, beige, and warm skin tones, creating an intimate and somewhat mysterious mood. The image has a slightly grainy, lo-fi aesthetic, reminiscent of a personal snapshot.
